title: Adding Columns to Boards
excerpt: Is there a way when adding a column to only add it to one view? Right now when I add a column it adds it to every view that I have and I have to go to each view individually to hide the columns.

posts.author: rbeckwith (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way when adding a column to only add it to one view? Right now when I add a column it adds it to every view that I have and I have to go to each view individually to hide the columns.

posts.author: Ag47Panda (Steve Wasson)
posts.cookedHtml: I hear you on this. I have to do the same thing. It also crops up in item card views when you add a new text field and it auto populates into all your text widgets. Best thing I have found is to always add new columns in the “Main View” as this is the core layout for the board and effects how they stack in the item card view. When added here it will pop up as the last column in the various views so they don’t mess up your layouts.

posts.author: Karmon (Karen)
posts.cookedHtml: Unfortunately, adding a column seems to apply to all views by default. It might be worth suggesting a feature request to the developers for more customization options.
